sourcesContent: const carGallery = (folder: string, assets: string[]) => assets.map((asset) => `/voyah-resources/images/car/${folder}/${asset}`) const modelGalleryMap: Record = { 'passion-L.html': carGallery('passion-L', [ '1920/sc_1.jpg', '1920/sc_2.jpg', '1920/sc_3.jpg', '1920/sc_4.jpg', '1920/sc_5.jpg', '1920/sc_7.jpg', '1920/sc_8.jpg', '1920/sc_9.jpg' ]), 'passion.html': 'bg_free_pc23_0001.jpg', 'bg_free_pc28_0001_1920.jpg', 'bg_free_pc29_0001.jpg' ]), 'newCourage.html': carGallery('newCourage', [ '1920/sc_1.jpg', '1920/sc_3.jpg', '1920/sc_4.jpg', '1920/sc_6.jpg',
